prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-FAEERLP-STD-BLCK Product Type: PLANNER Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Exercise Equipment Rules Laminated Poster For Gym Fitness Area Description: Fitness Area rules by Productive Fitness are an essential part of any professional health club, gym, fitness center, hotel exercise area, or home gym. Now you can make sure your gym is safe with the Productive Fitness Rule Guidelines Laminated Poster.

This large bold poster is easy for anyone to notice, even if they are far away.

Injury prevention is key to any fitness program you or your clients are working on. These basic fitness area rules will help your clients get started and keep them protected from injury. Search Terms: fitness poster health planner at home gym workout excercise information womens diet nutrition exercise dumbell bodyweight ball body weight stretching Features: - Laminated - Size: 24" x 36" - Ideal for Beginners - Essential for any fitness setting === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness Exercise Equipment Rules Laminated Poster 24x36

openai.item_name: Productive Fitness 24x36 in Laminated Exercise Equipment Rules Poster

anthropic.title_differentiation: Laminated, 24 X 36 Inches, Gym Safety Rules, Injury Prevention, Ideal For Beginners, Home And Commercial Fitness Areas

openai.title_differentiation: Laminated 24" X 36" Wall Poster, Bold Large Print, Beginner Friendly, Injury Prevention Rules, Gym And Home Use
